productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Tan Handbag
description: A perfect blend of practicality and style, this bag from lino perros comes in classic nailed pattern and has copious space to carry your essentials safely. Height: 29 cmWidth: 47 cmDepth: 13 cm Made of synthetic leather with a fabric inner lining Rounded and padded handles with buckled straps on the front and back for style One main zippered compartment that has two zippered pouches and two organiser pouches One zippered compartment each at the front and back Branded zippers and sliders for durability Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
